author: tmiychao
content:
We are now a month into the cohort! Looking forward to see your progress during week 5 at peak of your initial research. 

As always share your updates with s*hort one sentence description* here and don't forget to add them as PR to the github repo. 

This is also time to add your project proposals there for review in the repo. But if you have any questions before submitting it, reach out!
